name: DW · Dim Campaign
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS campaign_id,
    'CMP-' || lpad(gs::text, 4, '0')                                           AS campaign_code,
    (ARRAY['Spring','Summer','Fall','Winter','Holiday','Launch','Flash','Loyalty','Brand','Retarget'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('KNM'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 10)::int]
        || ' ' ||
    (ARRAY['Sale','Push','Blast','Drive','Promo'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('KSUF'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 5)::int]
        || ' ' || (2023 + (gs % 3))                                            AS campaign_name,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('KCHAN'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 12)::int       AS channel_id,
    CURRENT_DATE - (('x'||substr(md5('KSTART'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 1000)::int AS start_date,
    round((( ('x'||substr(md5('KBUD'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 200000)::int + 5000)::numeric, 2) AS budget,
    (ARRAY['Active','Completed','Completed','Paused'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('KSTAT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 4)::int]  AS status
FROM generate_series(1, 100) AS gs
